tree.name: Immanuel Quickley
tree.tradeDescription: Raptors traded OG Anunoby, Precious Achiuwa, and Malachi Flynn to Knicks for RJ Barrett, Immanuel Quickley, and a 2024 second-round pick (DET own, became Jonathan Mogbo #31). Toronto also received a trade exception.
tree.note: Came with RJ Barrett in the OG Anunoby trade

assetsGivenUp.name: OG Anunoby
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 23rd overall in 2017 out of Indiana

assetsGivenUp.name: Precious Achiuwa
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Raptors sign-and-traded Kyle Lowry to Miami Heat for Precious Achiuwa and Goran Dragic. Toronto also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Came in Kyle Lowry sign-and-trade to Miami

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Lowry
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Raptors traded Gary Forbes and a 2013 first-round pick (#12, became Steven Adams) to Houston Rockets for Kyle Lowry.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired via trade from Houston in 2012. Became franchise cornerstone and 2019 champion.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2013 1st Round Pick (#12)
assetsGivenUp.details: 2013 First Round Pick (TOR own). Became Steven Adams.
